name: Turkey and Swiss Pockets
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 5 biscuits from the tube on a flat surface; press flat.
2. Divide equally, place sliced turkey and sliced Swiss cheese on top of each biscuit.
3. Spread remaining 5 biscuits with prepared honey mustard; place mustard side down on bottom biscuits.
4. Press to seal the top biscuits to bottoms.
5. Place on a baking sheet, and bake following the package directions.
6. Makes 5 servings.
(Note: This recipe was originally shared by Lynn Thomas (dcqp82a) in Family Circle Magazine on May 13, 1997, and notes from her personal experience of making this version on July 19, 1997 are included.)
